Package org.eventb.pptrans.tests

Class MapletDecomposerTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.pptrans.tests.AbstractTranslationTests
org.eventb.pptrans.tests.MapletDecomposerTests
public class MapletDecomposerTests extends AbstractTranslationTests
Unit tests for class MapletDecomposer. Note : All expected predicates must be quantified, so sometimes a dummy quantifier "∃x⦂ℤ·" is added in front of the expected predicate in the test specification.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class org.eventb.pptrans.tests.AbstractTranslationTests

    Description
    MapletDecomposerTests()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    testDecomposeAlreadyBound()
    Ensure that processing an expression that needs to be decomposed produces the expected predicate even when variables are already bound.
    void
    testDecomposeComplex()
    Ensure that processing an expression that needs to be decomposed produces the expected predicate in a complex case.
    void
    testDecomposeNoChange()
    Ensure that processing an expression that do not need to be decomposed doesn't make any change.
    void
    testDecomposeSimpleLeft()
    Ensure that processing an expression that needs to be decomposed produces the expected predicate in a simple case.
    void
    testDecomposeSimpleRight()
    Ensure that processing an expression that needs to be decomposed produces the expected predicate in a simple case.
    void
    testRecordingDecomposeCreateComplex()
    Ensure that recording an expression that needs decomposition creates bound variables, even in a complicated case.
    void
    testRecordingDecomposeCreateSimple()
    Ensure that recording an expression that needs decomposition creates bound variables.
    void
    testRecordingDecomposeNoChange()
    Ensure that recording an already decomposed expression does not change anything.
    void
    testRecordingPushNoChange()
    Ensure that pushing an expression does not change anything.

  • Method Details

    • testRecordingDecomposeNoChange

      public void testRecordingDecomposeNoChange()
      Ensure that recording an already decomposed expression does not change anything.

    • testRecordingDecomposeCreateSimple

      public void testRecordingDecomposeCreateSimple()
      Ensure that recording an expression that needs decomposition creates bound variables.

    • testRecordingDecomposeCreateComplex

      public void testRecordingDecomposeCreateComplex()
      Ensure that recording an expression that needs decomposition creates bound variables, even in a complicated case.

    • testRecordingPushNoChange

      public void testRecordingPushNoChange()
      Ensure that pushing an expression does not change anything.

    • testDecomposeNoChange

      public void testDecomposeNoChange()
      Ensure that processing an expression that do not need to be decomposed doesn't make any change.

    • testDecomposeSimpleLeft

      public void testDecomposeSimpleLeft()
      Ensure that processing an expression that needs to be decomposed produces the expected predicate in a simple case.

    • testDecomposeSimpleRight

      public void testDecomposeSimpleRight()
      Ensure that processing an expression that needs to be decomposed produces the expected predicate in a simple case.

    • testDecomposeComplex

      public void testDecomposeComplex()
      Ensure that processing an expression that needs to be decomposed produces the expected predicate in a complex case.

    • testDecomposeAlreadyBound

      public void testDecomposeAlreadyBound()
      Ensure that processing an expression that needs to be decomposed produces the expected predicate even when variables are already bound.
